description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests on Linux that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions, Boost interfaces, and Capstone versions. The job checks out the repository, sets up Python, upgrades pip, installs dependencies, LLVM, Clang, Z3, Bitwuzla, Capstone, Unicorn, and LIEF, compiles Triton with various interfaces, and runs unittests.
